image:image.image:title: Bakir Kammoun — Full-Stack & WebGL Developer | Tunisia
image:image.image:caption: Bakir Kammoun, Full-Stack Web and WebGL Developer from Sidi Bouzid, Tunisia. Specialized in React, Django, Spring Boot, Unity and IoT.

image:image.image:title: Bakir Kammoun — ISET Mahdia Graduation & Academic Achievement
image:image.image:caption: Bakir Kammoun graduating from ISET Mahdia with a Bachelor's degree in IT: Multimedia & Web Development (2022–2025).

image:image.image:title: Bakir Kammoun — Developer at Work
image:image.image:caption: Bakir Kammoun coding and working on full-stack web development projects.

image:image.image:title: Bakir Kammoun — Professional Developer Portrait
image:image.image:caption: Professional headshot and portrait of Bakir Kammoun, Full-Stack Developer from Tunisia.

image:image.image:title: Bakir Kammoun — Digital Entrepreneur & Tech Visionary
image:image.image:caption: Bakir Kammoun as a digital entrepreneur and tech innovator from Tunisia, combining IoT, AI, and full-stack web development.

image:image.image:title: Bakir Kammoun — Three.js 3D Game Project
image:image.image:caption: Bakir Kammoun's 3D game project built with Three.js and WebGL — interactive browser-based 3D experiments with particle effects and physics simulation.

image:image.image:title: Bakir Kammoun — E-Learning Platform Project
image:image.image:caption: E-learning platform developed by Bakir Kammoun using React, Node.js, Express and MongoDB — featuring Admin, Teacher and Student portals with course management.

image:image.image:title: Bakir Kammoun — IoT Smart Predictive Maintenance Project
image:image.image:caption: Bakir Kammoun's IoT predictive maintenance system using ESP32, MQTT protocol, React dashboard and machine learning for industrial equipment failure prediction.

image:image.image:title: Bakir Kammoun — MERN Real-Time Chat App
image:image.image:caption: MERN stack real-time chat application by Bakir Kammoun — instant messaging with WebSocket (Socket.IO), MongoDB, Express, React and Node.js.

image:image.image:title: Bakir Kammoun — React Posts & Filtering App
image:image.image:caption: React experience posts application by Bakir Kammoun with advanced filtering by category, date and popularity — responsive SCSS-styled UI.

image:image.image:title: Bakir Kammoun — Angular Hotel Reservation System
image:image.image:caption: Hotel reservation management system developed by Bakir Kammoun using Angular and TypeScript — full CRUD operations for bookings, rooms and availability.
